mapper.select: SELECT a.write_year, a.doc_type, a.doc_no, a.orgn_id, a.orgn_nm, a.start_at, a.end_at, a.process_overview, a.head_id, a.head_nm, a.comp_id, a.use_yn, a.confirm_yn, a.confirm_dt, a.created_at, a.write_dt, b.doc_seq as hr_doc_seq, b.hr_id, b.hr_nm, c.doc_no as proc_doc_no, c.doc_seq as proc_doc_seq, c.process_id FROM esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds a LEFT OUTER JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_participant b ON b.write_year = a.write_year AND b.doc_type = a.doc_type AND b.doc_no = a.doc_no LEFT OUTER JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis c ON c.write_year = a.write_year AND c.doc_type = a.doc_type AND c.doc_no = a.doc_no WHERE a.doc_type = #{docType} AND a.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY a.use_yn DESC, a.write_year DESC, CAST(a.doc_no AS INTEGER) DESC

SELECT a.write_year, a.doc_type, a.doc_no, a.remark, a.orgn_id, a.orgn_nm, a.start_at, a.end_at, a.process_overview, a.head_id, a.head_nm, a.comp_id, a.use_yn, a.member_count, a.created_at, a.confirm_yn, a.confirm_dt, a.write_dt, b.doc_seq as hr_doc_seq, b.hr_id, b.hr_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm as minor_nm, c.doc_no as proc_doc_no, c.doc_seq as proc_doc_seq, c.process_id, coalesce(c.process_nm, '') AS process_nm, coalesce(c.process_desc, '') AS process_desc, c.rev_no, c2.rev_nm, CASE WHEN g.process_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isUsed, d.doc_no as itme_do_no, d.doc_seq as item_doc_seq, d.doc_item_seq, d.type, d.item_id, d.item_nm, d.created_at, d.doc_item_seq FROM esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds a LEFT OUTER JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_participant b ON b.write_year = a.write_year AND b.doc_type = a.doc_type AND b.doc_no = a.doc_no LEFT OUTER JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis c ON c.write_year = a.write_year AND c.doc_type = a.doc_type AND c.doc_no = a.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm c2 ON c.process_id = c2.process_id AND c.rev_no = c2.rev_no LEFT OUTER JOIN ESG.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_item d ON d.write_year = c.write_year AND d.doc_type = c.doc_type AND d.doc_no = c.doc_no AND d.doc_seq = c.doc_seq LEFT OUTER JOIN esg.tb_hr_info e ON e.hr_id = b.hr_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = e.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} LEFT OUTER JOIN esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey g ON g.process_id = c.process_id AND g.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE a.write_year = #{writeYear} AND a.doc_type = #{docType} AND a.doc_no = #{docNo} AND a.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY d.doc_item_seq ASC, b.doc_seq ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds ( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, ORGN_ID, ORGN_NM, HEAD_ID, HEAD_NM, START_AT, END_AT, PROCESS_OVERVIEW, MEMBER_COUNT, REMARK, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, COMP_ID, WRITE_DT ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{orgnId}, #{orgnNm}, #{headId}, #{headNm}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{processOverview}, #{memberCount}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{compId}, #{writeDt} )

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_participant ( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, DOC_SEQ, HR_ID, HR_NM, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, (SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_participant WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}), #{list.hrId}, #{list.hrNm}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )

mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, process_id, process_nm, rev_no, process_desc, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{processId}, #{processNm}, #{revNo}, #{processDesc}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_item ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, doc_item_seq, type, item_id, item_nm, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, (SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_item_seq::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docItemSeq FROM esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_item WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq}), #{list.type}, #{list.itemId}, #{list.itemNm}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )

mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds SET ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}, ORGN_NM = #{orgnNm}, HEAD_ID = #{headId}, HEAD_NM = #{headNm}, START_AT = #{startAt}, END_AT = #{endAt}, PROCESS_OVERVIEW = #{processOverview}, MEMBER_COUNT = #{memberCount}, REMARK = #{remark}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, WRITE_DT = #{writeDt} WHERE WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND DOC_TYPE = #{docType} AND DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND COMP_ID = #{compId}
mapper.select: select t1.doc_no from esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds t1 where t1.confirm_yn = 'Y' and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
